zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mor Earl of Lennox於1268年出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾時，他的父親Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan37歲，母親Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan33歲。他於1285年之前與Marjorie Campbell在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1306年12月在他的家鄉享年38歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Mor Earl of Lennox于1268年出生在苏格兰登巴頓史爾时，他的父亲Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan37岁，母亲Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan33岁。他于1285年之前与Marjorie Campbell在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1306年12月在他的家乡享年38岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Arie, Avi, Eliezer, Erez, Etty, Haim, Hedva, Ilan, Itai, Moshe, Noam.
Jewish (Israeli): shortened and Hebraicized form of some original Ashkenazic surname starting in Mor-.

variants.name: Mohr
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived in a fen, Middle Low German mōr.
German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Danish, and Dutch (of German origin): nickname for a man of swarthy complexion, from Middle High German mōr, German Mohr, and Middle Dutch moor ‘Moor’.
German: from a short form of an old personal name, Morhart (see Morath ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Mor Earl of Lennox was born in 1268, in Dunbartonshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan, was 37 and his mother, Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, was 33. He married Marjorie Campbell before 1285, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in December 1306, in his hometown, at the age of 38, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Mor Earl of Lennox est né en 1268, à Dunbartonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Marjorie Campbell avant 1285, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en décembre 1306, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Mor Earl of Lennox 1268 in Dunbartonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan 37 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan 33. Er hat vor 1285 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland Marjorie Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb im Dezember 1306 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Mor Earl of Lennox è nato il nel 1268 nel Dunbartonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Marjorie Campbell prima del 1285, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel dicembre 1306, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Mor Earl of Lennoxが1268年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallanは37歳，母Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallanは33歳であった。1285年以前にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウでMarjorie Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1306年12月に故郷で38歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mor Earl of Lennox(이)가 1268년 스컷랜드 던바토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1285년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 Marjorie Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1306년 12월 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mor Earl of Lennox nasceu em 1268, em Dunbartonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjorie Campbell antes 1285, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1306, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mor Earl of Lennox родился в 1268 г. в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjorie Campbell перед 1285 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер декабрь 1306 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Mor Earl of Lennox nació en 1268, en Dunbartonshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Marjorie Campbell antes de 1285, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en diciembre de 1306, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
